falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 81% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low structure; a break below 4,800 would violate the August 2024 bottom's floor and invalidate the bottoming pattern thesis, suggesting continuation lower rather than accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained VIX above 25 would indicate genuine panic-driven deleveraging rather than the controlled, low-volatility bottoming process implied by a blowoff score of 40; this would prove the current 'HOLD' signal misread the regime as complacent accumulation rather than pre-crisis positioning

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50 basis points (more negative than -0.50%)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion would signal accelerating recession pricing that contradicts a bottoming narrative; the August 2024 bottom occurred during curve steepening from inversion, so further inversion would break the analog and invalidate the pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
